text: Being here feels like standing on the threshold of curiosity. The first image places me in the presence of a thoughtful guide—a volunteer, calm and approachable, signaling openness through body language. Their presence offers reassurance, as if I am welcome to ask questions and wander. In the second image, vibrant colors and the bold declaration of 'R+D' on the wall remind me how human progress is born from inquiry and creation. I sense anticipation—a mixture of inspiration and humility—in this environment devoted to ideas and innovation. Here, I am both a spectator and a participant in the unfolding story of discovery.
